summary: Phase 1 Feature Testing Complete - All major features verified working. Fixed bug in article creation where new Phase 1 fields (contact_person_ids, contact_person_notify_id, edit_permission_user_ids, edit_permission_group_ids) were not being saved.
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/articles.py - Added missing Phase 1 fields to create_article function
seed_data_creation: Created test article TEST_Multiple_Contact_Persons for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 features fully implemented and tested. All backend endpoints working. Frontend UI verified for Dashboard (Pinnwand at top, expiring articles), ArticleEditor (multiple contact persons, edit permissions, reading assignment, Wiedervorlage removed), Articles (DELETE confirmation), UserManagement (DELETE confirmation with article transfer option).

dashboard.pinnwand_at_top: PASS - Pinnwand section displayed at top of dashboard with NEWS and SPECIALS categories
dashboard.expiring_articles: PASS - 'Bald ablaufend' section shows articles with urgency badges (Noch Morgen, Noch 4 Tage)

article_editor.wiedervorlage_removed: PASS - Wiedervorlage field not present in editor
article_editor.multiple_contact_persons: PASS - Ansprechpartner section with checkboxes for multiple selection and radio button for notification
article_editor.edit_permissions: PASS - Bearbeitungsrechte section with user and group selection, role badges (Admin/Editor)
article_editor.reading_assignment: PASS - Leseaufgabe section with 'Als Leseaufgabe zuweisen' checkbox

articles.delete_confirmation: PASS - DELETE confirmation dialog with 'DELETE eingeben' input field
articles.categories_sidebar: PASS - Categories displayed with Pinnwand NEWS and Pinnwand SPECIALS

user_management.delete_confirmation: PASS - DELETE confirmation dialog with 'DELETE eingeben' input field
user_management.article_transfer: PASS - Article transfer option available (not visible when user has no articles)

article_view.version_history_hidden_for_viewers: PASS - Änderungshistorie only shown when canEdit is true

backend_tests_summary.TestStatsEndpoint: 2/2 passed - expired_articles and expiring_articles fields present
backend_tests_summary.TestUserDeletionWithTransfer: 2/2 passed - article-count endpoint and delete behavior correct
backend_tests_summary.TestPinnwandCategories: 2/2 passed - is_pinnwand field and pinnwand/articles endpoint working
backend_tests_summary.TestVersionHistory: 1/1 passed - version history endpoint returning correct data
backend_tests_summary.TestArticleModels: 1/1 passed - all Phase 1 fields present in article model

bug_fixed.description: Article creation was not saving Phase 1 fields (contact_person_ids, contact_person_notify_id, edit_permission_user_ids, edit_permission_group_ids)
bug_fixed.fix: Added missing fields to Article() constructor in create_article function
